nodes.label: Homepage Redesigned Mobile Screenshot
nodes.description: Redesigned mobile homepage showing personalized greeting 'Olá, Aluno!', an 'Explore habilidades' search bar, a 2x2 grid of category cards (Skills, Agentes, Comunicação, Design), and a bottom navigation bar with Home, Perfil, and Comunidade tabs. Validation: Inter Font, Mobile Layout, 4 Cards.
